notes: Precision note: HP Inc. as the current legal entity dates to Nov 2015, when the original Hewlett-Packard Company split into HP Inc. (PCs/printers) and Hewlett Packard Enterprise. HP Inc. retained the original 1939 founding history, stock ticker, and brand identity per Wikipedia/Britannica/HP's own history page, so 1939 is recorded as the founding year per the schema's own naming-lineage convention (same treatment as Canon/Oce), not the 2015 legal incorporation date.
